name: union_map_union_value_try_cast
description: M3d over-claim GUARD (cold-review F-CR2): union map<string,int> | map<string,int|string> with {"u":{"a":"1"}}. try_cast_map recursively try_casts each value: the first map's value try_cast fails (int rejects the string "1"), the second map's value is a union whose try_cast (int|string) selects the string arm at score 0, so the second map wins -> {"a":"1"}. Native tryCastMap now recurses into UNION-valued map values via tryCastUnionArm. want live-captured from BAML final parse.
